other.property: 'false' if (type1 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),2)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),3)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),4)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),5)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none' or type5 in 'none' or type6 in 'none' or type7 in 'none' or type8 in 'none' or type9 in 'none' or type10 in 'none' or type11 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),12)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none' or type5 in 'none' or type6 in 'none' or type7 in 'none' or type8 in 'none' or type9 in 'none' or type10 in 'none' or type11 in 'none' or type12 in 'none' or type13 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),14)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none' or type5 in 'none' or type6 in 'none' or type7 in 'none' or type8 in 'none' or type9 in 'none' or type10 in 'none' or type11 in 'none' or type12 in 'none' or type13 in 'none' or type14 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),15)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none' or type5 in 'none' or type6 in 'none' or type7 in 'none' or type8 in 'none' or type9 in 'none' or type10 in 'none' or type11 in 'none' or type12 in 'none' or type13 in 'none' or type14 in 'none' or type15 in 'none' or type16 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),17)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none' or type5 in 'none' or type6 in 'none' or type7 in 'none' or type8 in 'none' or type9 in 'none' or type10 in 'none' or type11 in 'none' or type12 in 'none' or type13 in 'none' or type14 in 'none' or type15 in 'none' or type16 in 'none' or type17 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),18)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none' or type5 in 'none' or type6 in 'none' or type7 in 'none' or type8 in 'none' or type9 in 'none' or type10 in 'none' or type11 in 'none' or type12 in 'none' or type13 in 'none' or type14 in 'none' or type15 in 'none' or type16 in 'none' or type17 in 'none' or type18 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),19)'

'false' if (type1 in 'none' or type2 in 'none' or type3 in 'none' or type4 in 'none' or type5 in 'none' or type6 in 'none' or type7 in 'none' or type8 in 'none' or type9 in 'none' or type10 in 'none' or type11 in 'none' or type12 in 'none' or type13 in 'none' or type14 in 'none' or type15 in 'none' or type16 in 'none' or type17 in 'none' or type18 in 'none' or type19 in 'none') else 'String.IsEqual(Container(9000).ListItem.Property(id),$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]) + String.IsEqual(Window(home).Property(WidgetFocus$SKINSHORTCUTS[id]),20)'

propertyGroup.name: widgetSmall
propertyGroup.property: 'true' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else 'false'
'true' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else 'false'

'248' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '265' if art in 'squareicon' else '300' if art in 'portraiticon' else '218'
'265.7' if art in 'squareicon' else '206.65' if art in 'portraiticon' else '372'

'' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else 'diffuse/rounded5-290x290.png' if art in 'squareicon' else 'diffuse/rounded5-212x319.png' if art in 'portraiticon' else 'diffuse/rounded5-445x250.png'

'32,14,14,14' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '15,31,15,17' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else '10'
'WidgetPosterInfoContainer' if widget in 'info' and (art in 'squareicon' or art in 'landscapeicon') else 'WidgetFanartInfoContainer' if widget in 'info' and art in 'fanart' else 'WidgetContainer'
'true' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows' or type in 'musicvideos') and statuswatched in 'true' else 'false'
'33' if art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else '18'

propertyGroup.name: widgetMedium
propertyGroup.property: 'true' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else 'false'
'true' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else 'false'

'290' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '310' if art in 'squareicon' else '339' if art in 'portraiticon' else '270'
'310' if art in 'squareicon' else '232.5' if art in 'portraiticon' else '465'

'' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else 'diffuse/rounded5-290x290.png' if art in 'squareicon' else 'diffuse/rounded5-212x319.png' if art in 'portraiticon' else 'diffuse/rounded5-445x250.png'

'35,14,14,14' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '16,33,16,17' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else '10'
'WidgetPosterInfoContainer' if widget in 'info' and (art in 'squareicon' or art in 'landscapeicon') else 'WidgetFanartInfoContainer' if widget in 'info' and art in 'fanart' else 'WidgetContainer'
'true' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows' or type in 'musicvideos') and statuswatched in 'true' else 'false'
'36' if art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else '18'

propertyGroup.name: widgetBig
propertyGroup.property: 'true' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else 'false'
'true' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else 'false'

'346' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '372' if art in 'squareicon' else '388' if art in 'portraiticon' else '357'
'372' if art in 'squareicon' else '265.7' if art in 'portraiticon' else '620'

'' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else 'diffuse/rounded5-290x290.png' if art in 'squareicon' else 'diffuse/rounded5-212x319.png' if art in 'portraiticon' else 'diffuse/rounded5-445x250.png'

'39,14,14,14' if (type in 'albums' or type in 'songs' or type in 'musicvideos') and art in 'squareicon' and casemusic in 'true' else '16,36,16,18' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows') and art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else '10'
'WidgetPosterInfoContainer' if type in 'info' and (art in 'squareicon' or art in 'landscapeicon') else 'WidgetFanartInfoContainer' if type in 'info' and art in 'fanart' else 'WidgetContainer'
'true' if (type in 'movies' or type in 'episodes' or type in 'tvshows' or type in 'musicvideos') and statuswatched in 'true' else 'false'
'49' if art in 'portraiticon' and casevideo in 'true' else '18'

other.property: true
false
noop
diffuse/rounded5-330x495.png
noop
diffuse/rounded5-376x376.png
